title: Important product answer is not visible in crawlable text
evidence: The visible page answers compatibility only inside an image.
Rendered HTML does not include equivalent text near the product details.
impact: Google may have less context for complex product questions and snippet generation.
recommendation: Add visible text that explains compatibility, limitations and use cases near the product details.
validation: Inspect rendered HTML and monitor Search Console queries for compatibility-related impressions after recrawl.
open_questions: Are there verified compatibility specs from the product team?
